name: Chocolate Pots De Creme
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the German cooking chocolate into small pieces.
2. In a small nonmetal bowl, stir together light cream, chopped chocolate, sugar, and salt.
3. Cook over 100% power for about 1 minute or until the chocolate is melted, stirring after 30 seconds.
4. Stir in about half of the hot mixture into the beaten egg yolk.
5. Return all to the bowl and mix well.
6. Cook uncovered on 50% power for 1 to 2 minutes or until thickened, stirring every 15 seconds.
7. Stir in vanilla.
8. Pour into a pot de creme cup or 6-ounce custard cup.
9. Cover and chill for several hours or until firm.
10. Garnish with whipped cream, if desired.
